title: Omnigent: The New Meta-Harness for EVERY Coding Agent - Claude Code, Codex, Pi, More
summary: Omnigent is a meta-harness that orchestrates multiple coding agents like Claude Code, Codex, and Pi as interchangeable workers under a unified interface. It enables workflows where different models handle different tasks, with governance, human-in-the-loop controls, and cross-device session persistence.
writeup: This video covers Omnigent, a meta-harness that orchestrates multiple coding agents (Claude Code, Codex, Pi, and others) as interchangeable workers behind a single unified interface. The setup matters because it routes different tasks to different models rather than committing to one agent, while adding governance and human-in-the-loop controls over what those agents do. Key takeaways: cross-device session persistence carries work across machines, and the routing layer lets each model handle the tasks it suits.
